---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Describe the feature** A clear description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

**Use case** Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

**Proposed solution** If you have an idea for how this could work, describe it here.

**Additional context** Any other context, screenshots, or references.
